prompt: {"type":"anime cyberpunk storyboard collage","style":"dark cinematic mecha illustration, highly detailed, moody industrial sci-fi, painterly anime rendering, desaturated steel-gray palette with black metal and subtle crimson glow accents","subject":{"primary character":{"type":"female android elf","appearance":"slim young woman with pale skin, short bob-cut {argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"icy blue\"} hair, straight bangs, pointed elf ears, red eyes, calm stoic expression","outfit":"black biomechanical bodysuit made of layered cables, plates, straps, and exposed mechanical components, shredded trailing elements behind the legs and back"},"secondary character":{"type":"giant humanoid mech","appearance":"towering armored robot with bulky charcoal plating, battle-worn surfaces, glowing red sensor eyes, intimidating silhouette"},"prop":"a dark mechanical helmet with a single red glowing optic held in one hand"},"environment":{"setting":"vast gothic-industrial cathedral interior converted into a futuristic factory","details":["towering arches","hanging cables and chains","metal walkways with railings","foggy atmospheric depth","wet reflective floor","massive walls full of machinery and vertical structures"]},"layout":{"composition":"3 by 3 storyboard grid, one unified illustration divided by black borders","sections":[{"position":"top-left","count":1,"description":"wide establishing shot of the small android elf standing alone in the center of an immense cathedral-like industrial hall"},{"position":"top-center","count":1,"description":"side-view full-body shot of the android elf walking along a metal catwalk"},{"position":"top-right","count":1,"description":"close side profile portrait showing the elf ear, blue hair, red eye, and intricate neck and head machinery"},{"position":"middle-left","count":1,"description":"close-up of a hand holding the dark robotic helmet with red glowing lens"},{"position":"middle-center","count":1,"description":"rear view of the blue-haired android elf facing the giant mech at close range in the industrial corridor"},{"position":"middle-right","count":1,"description":"low-angle medium portrait of the android elf looking slightly downward, emphasizing the armored torso and neck mechanisms"},{"position":"bottom-left","count":1,"description":"intimate face-to-face side profile scene between the giant mech and the android elf, contrasting their scale"},{"position":"bottom-center","count":2,"description":"split close-up diptych, left half on the elf's red eye and blue hair, right half on the mech's red glowing optic"},{"position":"bottom-right","count":1,"description":"wide rear shot of the mech and the android elf standing side by side or walking forward into the cathedral hall"}]},"lighting":{"overall":"low-key dramatic lighting with cool gray ambience","accents":"small red LEDs and glowing optics scattered through the character designs and machinery","mood":"lonely, ominous, elegant, futuristic"},"camera":"mix of establishing wide shots, profile portraits, low-angle hero shots, and extreme close-ups, arranged like a cinematic storyboard","quality":"ultra-detailed, sharp focus, atmospheric perspective, polished concept-art finish"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"动漫赛博朋克项目拼贴","style":"暗黑电影级机甲插画，高度细节，情绪化的工业科幻，绘画感动漫渲染，去饱和钢灰色调，带有黑色金属质感和微妙的深红色光效点缀","subject":{"primary character":{"type":"女性安卓精灵","appearance":"身材苗条的年轻女性，皮肤苍白，短波波头 {argument name=\"hair color\" default=\"冰蓝色\"} 发型，齐刘海，尖尖的精灵耳，红眼，表情冷静从容","outfit":"黑色生物力学紧身衣，由层叠的电缆、金属板、绑带和外露的机械组件构成，腿部和背部带有破损的拖曳元素"},"secondary character":{"type":"巨型人形机甲","appearance":"高耸的装甲机器人，覆盖着厚重的炭灰色装甲，表面布满战斗痕迹，闪烁着红色的传感器眼睛，轮廓极具威慑力"},"prop":"手中拿着一个带有单眼红色发光镜头的暗黑机械头盔"},"environment":{"setting":"被改造成未来工厂的巨大哥特式工业大教堂内部","details":["高耸的拱门","悬挂的电缆和链条","带有护栏的金属走道","雾气缭绕的氛围感","湿润的反射地面","布满机械和垂直结构的巨大墙壁"]},"layout":{"composition":"3x3 项目网格，由黑色边框分割的统一插画","sections":[{"position":"左上","count":1,"description":"广角定场镜头，小巧的安卓精灵独自站在巨大的大教堂式工业大厅中央"},{"position":"中上","count":1,"description":"安卓精灵在金属走道上行走的全身侧面镜头"},{"position":"右上","count":1,"description":"近景侧面肖像，展示精灵耳、蓝发、红眼以及复杂的颈部和头部机械结构"},{"position":"左中","count":1,"description":"手持带有红色发光镜头的暗黑机械头盔的特写"},{"position":"正中","count":1,"description":"安卓精灵背影，在工业走廊中近距离面对巨型机甲"},{"position":"右中","count":1,"description":"低角度中景肖像，安卓精灵微微向下看，强调装甲躯干和颈部机械装置"},{"position":"左下","count":1,"description":"巨型机甲与安卓精灵面对面的亲密侧面场景，对比两者体型差异"},{"position":"中下","count":2,"description":"分屏特写双联画，左半部分为精灵的红眼和蓝发，右半部分为机甲的红色发光镜头"},{"position":"右下","count":1,"description":"机甲与安卓精灵并肩站立或向大教堂大厅前方行走的广角背影镜头"}]},"lighting":{"overall":"低调戏剧性照明，带有冷灰色氛围","accents":"散布在角色设计和机械中的小型红色 LED 灯和发光镜头","mood":"孤独、不祥、优雅、未来感"},"camera":"融合了定场广角镜头、侧面肖像、低角度英雄镜头和极限特写，排列如同电影级项目","quality":"超精细，焦点清晰，大气透视，精致的概念艺术成品"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 赛博朋克安卓精灵项目：一组暗黑动漫风格的 3x3 项目拼贴画，展示了一位蓝发安卓精灵与巨型机甲在哥特式工业大教堂中的场景，非常适合作为电影级科幻概念艺术的提示词。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, wide shot, full-body, grid, hero shot, layered, vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: cinematic, anime, sci-fi]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: dramatic lighting, lens, camera]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
